description: AppShell.svelte unconditionally renders <header> and <main> elements regardless of AppShellState, which literally diverges from REQ-010, REQ-011, REQ-012 EARS clauses that begin 'WHEN AppShellState === Configured THEN the system SHALL render...'. The Sprint-1 FIND-209 review explicitly flagged this and offered two remediation paths: (a) add {#if state === 'Configured'} guards around header/main, or (b) revise the spec to permit always-on chrome. The Sprint-2 fix took neither path: the FIND-209 inert/aria-hidden remedy was applied, but the underlying literal-EARS divergence remains. The behavioral-spec was not updated to permit always-on chrome, and no {#if state === 'Configured'} guard was added.
